Case Studies

Real Results for Real Clients

See how NMAS delivers mining-grade reliability, seamless cloud migrations, and rock-solid cyber security across South Africa.

Mining

100% Uptime for Northern Cape Mine

MiningConnectivityCloud
Challenge

A junior mining operation experienced frequent connectivity outages that halted operations and cost thousands per hour.

Solution

NMAS deployed VSAT + 4G LTE bonding with automatic failover, replaced on-site servers with cloud infrastructure, and set up 24/7 NOC monitoring.

Results
99.9%
Reduction in downtime
<30s
Failover switch time
R0
Server hardware costs
Get similar results
Corporate

Cloud Migration for Cape Town SME

CloudMicrosoft 365SME
Challenge

A mid-sized Cape Town business ran aging on-premise servers prone to failure, with no backup strategy and no remote access for staff.

Solution

NMAS executed a zero-downtime migration to Microsoft 365, set up automated cloud backups, and deployed MDM for remote teams.

Results
0
Minutes of downtime
3x
Faster file access
100%
Remote workforce ready
Get similar results
Residential

Smart Home Security — Johannesburg

ResidentialCCTVSecurity
Challenge

A Johannesburg homeowner needed CCTV, access control, and network security after a neighbourhood burglary.

Solution

NMAS installed HD CCTV cameras, configured remote viewing, set up a secured Wi-Fi network with threat monitoring.

Results
24/7
Live camera monitoring
100%
Network threat coverage
1-Day
Installation complete
Get similar results
